name: UBA : Detected Activity from a Locked Machine
notes: Detects suspicious events from a locked machine.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Event Categories match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after any of BB:UBA : Workstation Locked match with the same Source IP
BB:UBA : Workstation Unlocked match in 6 minutes after BB:UBA : Workstation Locked match with the same Source IP
conditions_text: when BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Event Categories match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after any of BB:UBA : Workstation Locked match with the same Source IP
when none of BB:UBA : Workstation Unlocked match in 6 minutes after BB:UBA : Workstation Locked match with the same Source IP
thresholds: when BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Event Categories match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after any of BB:UBA : Workstation Locked match with the same Source IP
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Detected Activity from a Locked Machine on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Event Categories match at least 1 times in 5 minutes after any of BB:UBA : Workstation Locked match with the same Source IP
AND when none of BB:UBA : Workstation Unlocked match in 6 minutes after BB:UBA : Workstation Locked match with the same Source IP
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Detected Activity from a Locked Machine
